Variables.Name: bAutoDestroy
Variables.Description: Auto destroy this component on completion

Variables.Name: bStopWhenOwnerDestroyed
Variables.Description: Stop sound when owner is destroyed

Variables.Name: bAllowSpatialization
Variables.Description: Is this audio component allowed to be spatialized?

Variables.Name: bOverrideAttenuation
Variables.Description: Should the Attenuation Settings asset be used (false) or should the properties set directly on the component be used for attenuation properties

Variables.Name: AttenuationSettings
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is false, the asset to use to determine attenuation properties for sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: AttenuationOverrides
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is true, the attenuation properties to use for sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: ConcurrencySettings
Variables.Description: What sound concurrency to use for sounds generated by this audio component

Variables.Name: SoundClass
Variables.Description: Sound class this sound belongs to

Variables.Name: SourceEffectChain
Variables.Description: The source effect chain to use for this sound.

Variables.Name: SoundSubmixSends
Variables.Description: An array of submix sends. Audio from this sound will send a portion of its audio to these effects.

Variables.Name: bIsUISound
Variables.Description: Whether or not this sound plays when the game is paused in the UI

Functions.Name: IsPlaying
Functions.Description: Returns true if this component is currently playing.

Functions.Name: SetSubmixSend
Functions.Description: Sets how much audio the sound should send to the given submix.
